rewriteRule: Readonly empty state kullaniminda accessReason eksikse approved fallback ile tamamlanir; description literal/expression aynen korunur.

rewritePreview.after: <Empty description="Bos durum ornegi" access="readonly" accessReason="Yalniz goruntuleme" />

stopConditions: children ile custom body render ediliyorsa rewrite atlanir
description fonksiyon cagrisi ise manuel review gerekir

rollbackPlan: dry-run sonucu patch dosyasina alinmadan once owner review beklenir
inject edilen accessReason approved fallback listesinde degilse diff geri alinir
notes: Bu prototype source-level rewrite degil, approved fallback stratejisini gosteren iskelettir.
